opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I went to get out of bed tonight and my shoulders and hips were locked solid. The pain is a deep, paralyzing ache, and I cannot lift my arms above my chest.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight and now I can't get up, dress myself, or move properly — I'm on my own and I'm frightened something serious is wrong.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly tonight after I'd been resting for a while in a cold room; I've had milder aching in my shoulders and hips in the background for a few months
symptom_narrative.duration: the severe locked-up feeling has been going for a few hours tonight; the milder ache has been there on and off for months
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, heavy, paralysing ache with my shoulders and hips feeling stiff and locked, so it's very hard to get them moving
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I can't stand up from a chair without hauling myself up with my arms, and I can't raise my arms higher than my chest
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both shoulders and both hips and buttocks, and across the tops of my shoulders and neck
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst after resting and first thing, eases just a little once I warm up and move gently
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: warmth and gentle movement help a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: keeping still, resting, and the cold make it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel generally well in myself otherwise and I can't think of any fall or injury that started it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had milder aches in my shoulders and hips over recent months that I was told was arthritis or wear and tear
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand from the chair without using my arms, I can't dress myself, I can't lift my arms above chest height, and living on my own I'm stuck and can't manage tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: arthritis / wear-and-tear in the shoulders and hips
past_medical_history.how_managed: told it was arthritis; taking paracetamol for it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; acutely unable to mobilise, dress or care for herself tonight; the house was cold and she has now put the heating on
